title: Don't Specialize Too Early
html:
Don't Specialize Too Early

Stub. Teen-Yahir aphorism from August 2019: "Don't specialize to early" sitting alongside "The CEO's job isn't to make a decision it is to make the right decision" and "You have to be forced to be in a situation to learn from it… Chinese." (2019 08 15 youve got to have some sort of credentials). The same generalist-bias surfaces in 2019 08 18 contact yebw people where he stacks Chinese / AI / Business as parallel skill investments — three lanes, not one.
